description: Sampling continuous-time signals and reconstruction of continuous-time signals from samples; spectral analysis of signals using the discrete Fourier transform; the fast Fourier transform and fast convolution methods; z-transforms; finite and infinite impulse response filter design techniques; signal flow graphs and introduction to filter implementation.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: E C E 330, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: E C E 330, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
